description_long: This is a thick, old-looking book with a dark, possibly leather-bound cover adorned with a large red pentagram symbol at its center. The book features prominent metallic corner protectors and a central clasp, all rendered in a dull gold or brass color, giving it an antique and mystical appearance. The pages are visibly aged, with some areas stained by what appears to be dark red or brown marks, suggesting either heavy use or a thematic connection to the occult. The book's spine is reinforced with metallic bands and lacks any visible text or ornamentation. The overall design is robust and slightly worn, with a sense of weight and durability. The object exudes an aura of secrecy and ritual, making it stand out as a significant item in any urban fantasy or supernatural context.
description: A thick, antique book with a dark cover, red pentagram, and gold metal clasps, featuring stained, aged pages and a mystical, occult appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the book's thick, stained pages and the gold clasp and corner protectors, with the pentagram partially visible on the cover.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the central gold clasp, the full pentagram symbol on the cover, and the symmetrical metal corner protectors.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the book's page edges, more stains, and the pentagram on the cover, with the clasp and metal corners visible.
description_view_3: Spine view showing the reinforced metallic bands and the plain, dark spine with no visible text or decoration.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a large, bold red pentagram symbol centered on a dark, worn background. The design is simple yet striking, with no additional imagery or decorative elements beyond the metallic corner protectors and clasp.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is dark and reinforced with metallic bands, lacking any visible text or decorative patterns. Its design is plain and utilitarian.
